title: Multipurpose Plastic Cleaning Scraper Set, Non-Scratch 3Pcs Scraper Tool with 10Pcs Plastic Blades, Window Glass Paint Scraper Sticker Remover for Glass, Oven Glass,Table, Wall
features: Plastic Scraper Tool Kits: You will receive 3pc multifunctional plastic scraper + 10pcs plastic blade replacement. They are perfect for removing glue, sticker, decal, and label on delicate surfaces such as glass.

Practical Cleaning Tool:Ergonomic curved handle design for greater comfort and control, safe and non-slip, and the grip is very comfortable, and it will feel good after long-term use. Save time and effort in work, and improve your efficiency, lets you complete the work with a reduced amount of effort.

Non-Scratch Scrapers:The plastic razor blade scraper is made of carbon fiber plastic material, it is safe to clean glass without scratching the surface. Sturdy and durable, not easy to break. Special plastic material design that makes it take off stickers without scratching and also protect you from accidentally cutting yourself
Easy to Carry: These scraper tools can help you cleaning tight corners, edges, grooves and surface. Small and easy to carry, just put it in your handbag, tool box, or anywhere proper for you.

Wide Application: Use it as a glass scraping tool, food scraper, car scraper, paint scraper, lottery ticket scratcher tool, and etc. Easily remove stickers, labels, stuck-on food, grease and grime, adhesive residue, spattered latex paint, and more
description: Introducing the Ultimate Multi-Purpose Plastic Scraper Set. This comprehensive tool set includes everything needed for a variety of cleaning and scraping tasks. The ergonomic handle design ensures comfort and control, making tedious tasks less of a chore. The scrapers are made of carbon fiber plastic which won't scratch surfaces, and they're sturdy and durable to withstand extensive use. The set is also designed to be compact and portable, so you can take it wherever you need. From scraping off food residue, removing stickers, or even cleaning your car window, these tools are built to handle it all. Experience the difference and elevate your cleaning game with our Multi-Purpose Plastic Scraper Set today!
